description_long: This fire hydrant features a classic cylindrical body painted in a vivid red, topped with a domed, metallic silver cap. The cap is ribbed and slightly conical, with a small central protrusion at the top. The hydrant has two prominent side outlets, each capped with a metallic cover, and a central front-facing outlet, all of which are designed for hose attachment. The base is flanged and slightly wider, providing stability when mounted to the ground. The surface appears robust and industrial, with visible bolts and seams, and the paint shows a matte finish typical of outdoor emergency equipment. No chains or manufacturer markings are visible, and the hydrant is designed to be a fixed, immovable fixture in urban environments.
description: A robust red fire hydrant with a metallic silver domed cap and three capped hose outlets, featuring a sturdy, industrial design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main outlet and cap, with the domed silver top and side outlet visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cylindrical red body and the left-side outlet, with the cap and base clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the right-side outlet and the smooth, uninterrupted red body.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back outlet and the full width of the base, with the domed cap centered above.
